LanguageData.TwistedSunArrivedText: The atmosphere begins to be cut with a sudden red brilliance. The twisted sun has risen.\n\nRemain indoors at all times. During night, ventures may be made outside at the risk of the individual.
LanguageData.TwistedSunNightfall: The sun has set for now. It is relatively safe to go outside until the next morning
LanguageData.TwistedSunMorning: The sun will rise within an hour or two! Get back inside!
LanguageData.CleanRitualCompleteText: {0_nameDef} has finished performing {RITUAL_definite} ritual. The archotech will cleanse the area of twisted mechanites.
LanguageData.SingleVisitorArrivesFleshprise: {PAWN_titleIndef} from {1} is visiting the colony.\n\n{PAWN_pronoun} is named {PAWN_nameFull}.
LanguageData.GroupVisitorsArriveFleshprise: A group from {0} are visiting the colony.
